function.name: cross_section
function.description: Extract elevation or thickness profile along a user-defined transect. Shows values along a path between two points with distance markers. Requires a layer name - use available layers like 'SWOT Monthly Freeboard', 'ICESat-2 freeboard', or ask user to specify which layer to analyze.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to analyze (e.g., 'SWOT freeboard', 'ICESat-2 thickness')

start_location.description: Named starting location (e.g., 'Alaska', 'Beaufort Sea'). Alternative to start_point.

end_location.description: Named ending location (e.g., 'Greenland', 'Norway'). Alternative to end_point.

num_samples.description: Number of sample points along the transect (default 100)

include_stats.description: Whether to calculate statistics for the profile (default true)

visualize.description: Whether to draw the transect line on the map (default true)

geographical_area.description: Named area to help interpret the transect (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean')

ui.title: Extracting Cross-Section Profile
ui.details: Analyzing elevation/thickness along the specified transect
